mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_category ( cgid, cgnm, cgpi, cgur, insd ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{parentCategoryId}, #{categoryUrl}, now() );
INSERT INTO recipe_category ( cgid, cgsb, cgnm, cgpi, cgur, insd ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, 1, #{categoryName}, #{parentCategoryId}, #{categoryUrl}, now() );
INSERT INTO recipe_category ( cgid, cgsb, cgnm, cgpi, cgur, insd ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, 2, #{categoryName}, #{parentCategoryId}, #{categoryUrl}, now() );
INSERT INTO recipe_category ( cgid, cgsb, cgnm, cgpi, cgur, insd ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, 3, #{categoryName}, #{parentCategoryId}, #{categoryUrl}, now() );
mapper.select: SELECT cgsb , cgid , cgnm , cgpi , cgur FROM recipe_category WHERE cgsb = #{cgsb};
